Coverage Matrix
  ✅ [parser] Locate PBIP/TMDL files - Finds definition folders from repo root, .SemanticModel, or definition path.
  ✅ [extractor.tables] Table object extraction - Canonical table IDs are defined.
  ⚠️ [extractor.columns] Column extraction - Creates column nodes and parses calculated-column expressions for dependencies.
  ⚠️ [extractor.measures] Measure extraction - Creates measure nodes and resolves common DAX dependency reference patterns.
  ⚠️ [extractor.relationships] Relationship extraction - Extracts relationship properties and IDs; relationship edge enrichment is limited.
  ⚠️ [extractor.calc_groups] Calculation groups and items - Experimental: creates calc group/item nodes and parses calc-item expression dependencies.
  ⚠️ [extractor.field_params] Field parameter tables - Experimental: detects field parameter tables and parses partition-source dependencies.
